scripts.build:cli: esbuild packages/agent-comm/src/main.ts --bundle --format=esm --platform=node --target=node22 --outdir=packages/agent-comm/dist --splitting --log-level=warning --banner:js='import { createRequire as __agentCommCr } from "node:module"; const require = __agentCommCr(import.meta.url);' && cp packages/agent-comm/src/store/schema.store.sql packages/agent-comm/src/store/schema.hub.sql packages/agent-comm/dist/
